title: oncidium rigidum
intro: Oncidium rigidum, also known as the rigid oncidium, is a species of orchid native to the Americas. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that thrives on trees and other surfaces, characterized by its rigid and compact growth habit. The medicinal properties of Oncidium rigidum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions that can be consumed to harness its health benefits, including relief from coughs and colds, and as a natural remedy for digestive issues.
